name: Hungarian Allspice Poppy Seed Wafers
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease a heavy large cookie sheet.
Combine flour, poppy seeds, ground allspice and salt in a bowl.
Using a vegetable peeler, remove the zest of the orange in strips and add to a food processor with sugar.
Process until the zest is finely minced (about 2 minutes).
Beat butter and orange-sugar mixture in a medium bowl until fluffy.
Add egg yolks. Mix in dry ingredients until smooth soft dough forms.
Transfer half of the dough to a pastry bag fitted with a large star tip.
Pipe dough onto prepared sheets as 1-inch mounds, spacing 2 inches apart.
Repeat with remaining dough.
Bake until cookies are golden on top and brown on bottom (about 12 minutes).
Let cool on sheets for 3 minutes before transferring to racks to cool completely.
For glaze:
Blend powdered sugar with enough cream or milk in a small bowl to form a smooth medium-thin glaze.
Spread glaze over cooled cookies. Sprinkle with poppy seeds.
Let stand until glaze sets (about 40 minutes).
